Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11810 0 0}I am feeling a little hungry. Shall we get something to—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh my! This wonderful fragrance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}Just as I thought! It is takoyaki![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}I would prefer to first try takoyaki from its origin—in Osaka.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11876 0 0}...I know! We can go there now! It is just a train ride away, is it not?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11894 0 0}{f 5 13 15 30 112}Many thanks—katajikenai! Then let us prepare for the journ—[cr][n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 3 25 25}I had forgotten I am low on funds... My deepest apologies, {f 4 2}-dono.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe looks disappointed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we became a lot closer today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 3 -1 -1 0 0}If you do not wish to go, then I shall forgo this dream. It would be too lonely to journey alone...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe looks dejected...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we didn't get any closer today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 112 0 25 25}I suppose I must accept defeat this time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 0 -1 -1 0 0}To tell you the truth, my funds have... ah, run dry. I do not believe I can make a trip...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bebe looks embarrassed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I learned a little more about him today...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11908 0 0}I would still like to go to Osaka one day. When the time comes, I ask that you be my guide, {f 4 2}-dono![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 112 1 -1 -1 0 0}Now then... Let us march! To Octopia! Onwards![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After talking with Bebe over takoyaki,[n]I headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
